description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with a predominantly flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is characterized by a mix of solid wall sections and horizontal slatted elements, likely representing windows or sunshades, which add visual interest and allow for natural light. There are multiple volumes at varying heights, suggesting a split-level or multi-zone interior layout. The structure includes a prominent overhang and recessed areas, possibly indicating a carport or covered entryway. The color palette is primarily light gray and white, giving the house a sleek, contemporary appearance. Minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional forms are evident throughout the design.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with geometric lines, horizontal slats, and a light gray-white color scheme. Features include multiple volumes, overhangs, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry area with a prominent overhang and horizontal slatted facade elements.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the elongated profile, flat roof, and a recessed section that may serve as a carport or covered patio.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the solid wall sections and the stepped arrangement of the building's volumes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the flat roof, minimal window openings, and the overall linear form of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang and minimalistic door, no visible porch or decorative columns
